stories.title: Why Messi is the best player at the World Cup -- and the best male athlete of all time
stories.summary: Lionel Messi has long been considered the greatest soccer player ever, but he's so much more than that. He's the best male athlete, in any sport, in history.

stories.title: Silver: Unfair to turn Clark into 'political footb...
stories.summary: NBA commissioner Adam Silver said Fever star Caitlin Clark has become a "political football" amid debates about officiating and physical play in the WNBA.

stories.title: LeBron says he's not ready to reveal next team
stories.summary: LeBron James remains undecided about where he'll play this season. The NBA's all-time scoring leader and current free agent spoke Thursday but didn't reveal his next team choice.

stories.title: Heat's Riley makes LeBron pitch; Giannis 'excited'...
stories.summary: Pat Riley and Giannis Antetokounmpo said they would love for LeBron James to return to the Miami Heat.

stories.title: Ream: U.S. in 'shock' at poor showing in WC exit
stories.summary: USMNT captain Tim Ream said he and his teammates were in "shock" following their poor performance in exiting the 2026 World Cup at the hands of Belgium.
